title: HappyTG 0.4.0 production routing/auth repair
acceptanceCriteria: Public Telegram webhook URL is consistently /telegram/webhook in bot readiness, Caddy, and docs
Mini App projection endpoints fail closed without valid bearer/session user context
Public reverse proxy does not expose mutating control-plane endpoints without auth boundary
Mini App navigation works locally and behind /miniapp
Mini App approval actions are either real authenticated actions or not advertised
Production web_app links never use localhost/http and prefer HAPPYTG_MINIAPP_URL or HAPPYTG_PUBLIC_URL + /miniapp
Telegram Menu/Main Mini App setup is automatic when possible or clearly degraded/warned
Readiness/doctor reports invalid Mini App public URL or menu setup as degraded/warning
Config, self-hosting, and release docs distinguish webhook URL, Mini App URL, and menu setup
Regression tests cover auth, routing, Mini App links/actions, URL resolution, and menu setup
